reviews.comment:
Pésima atención. Precios fuera de proporción. (agua caliente del expedidor de la playa a 7 pesos, cuando a diez cuadras estaba a 2 pesos)
El shop igual... los productos al doble de su precio general. muy mal

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. Outrageous prices. (Hot water from the beach dispenser was 7 pesos, when it was 2 pesos ten blocks away.) The shop was the same... products were double their usual price. Very bad.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBdXBQQUp3EAE
